subcodes.first_line: O leaves of the Lote-Tree of Divine Unity! Render thanks unto God that ye have entered beneath the shade of the Tree of Oneness and partaken of its fruits [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات سدره توحید شکر ایزد را که در ظل شجره احدیت وارد گشتید و از اثمار
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation, @the power of words; of speech
